org_constraint: the entire response must not exceed 300 words.
new_constraint: The plan must contain at least 400 words.

    *   Constraint 1 says "not exceed 300 words" (Max = 300).

I will provide the plan but note the limitation regarding the word count, OR I must choose one constraint to prioritize.
